title: Marriage
actors: Aleksey Gribov, Faina Ranevskaya, Zoya Fyodorova
plot: Petty bourgeois Zhigalovs, whose daughter-in-law Dasha is being extradited, find out to their horror that the official Aplombov (Erast Garin), who had lunch with them daily and proved himself to be a fiance, is not going to marry ...
